description:
Lets agents query a FalkorDB graph database with Cypher.
Provides query (read-only by default, server-enforced), list_graphs and get_schema.

allow_writes.description: Permit CREATE/MERGE/SET/DELETE. When off, queries run via GRAPH.RO_QUERY and the server rejects write clauses.
allow_writes.title: Allow Writes

graph.description: Graph queried when the agent does not pass one explicitly.
graph.title: Default Graph

host.description: FalkorDB host, e.g. localhost or your-instance.falkordb.cloud.
host.title: Host

max_rows.description: Upper cap on rows returned to the agent per query.
max_rows.title: Max Rows

password.description: Password for the FalkorDB instance. Leave empty for no auth.
password.title: Password

query_timeout_ms.description: Server-side timeout for a single query.
query_timeout_ms.title: Query Timeout (ms)

tls.description: Connect with TLS (FalkorDB Cloud TLS endpoints).
tls.title: TLS

username.description: Username, e.g. "default" for FalkorDB Cloud. Leave empty for no auth.
username.title: Username

title: FalkorDB
